content: Phase 5 Search + Recall Quiz: 8 questions (3 Understand, 2 Apply, 2 Analyze, 1 Evaluate). Covers: intent classifier recall-vs-journal disambiguation, search data flow with dedup ranking, LIKE escape and custom drift Expression, Unicode-aware keyword bolding, getSessionContext USER-only rationale, citedSessionIds hallucination guard, search bolding debug scenario, confidence threshold change impact. Pass threshold: 70% (6/8).
